# remnawave_hosts (Data Source)

Lists all Remnawave hosts.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "remnawave_hosts" "all" {}

output "all_hosts" {
  value = data.remnawave_hosts.all.hosts
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Read-Only

- `hosts` (Attributes List) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--hosts))

<a id="nestedatt--hosts"></a>
### Nested Schema for `hosts`

Read-Only:

- `address` (String)
- `port` (Number)
- `remark` (String)
- `uuid` (String)
